book_summary: Leviticus has chapters 1-24 complete in restored/source-audited draft and mystical companion layers. The book now covers offerings and reparation, priestly ordination and rupture, clean/unclean ritual states, body and illness safeguards, Day of Atonement, holiness and social justice, difficult sexual/penalty texts with anti-weaponization metadata, priestly holy-food and bodily-wholeness boundaries, the appointed-times calendar, continual lamp and bread of presence, and a severe blasphemy/proportional-justice case framed with due-process, equal-law, restitution, and anti-violence safeguards.

chapters.notes: Appointed times: Sabbath, Passover/Unleavened Bread, firstfruits, Weeks, trumpet memorial, Day of Atonement, Booths, harvest justice.
Continual lamp, bread of presence, blasphemy case, equal law for native and sojourner, animal restitution, proportional justice.

translation_notes: Continual lamp and weekly bread of presence frame Leviticus 24 with sustained light, covenant, and holy provision.
The blasphemy verb may carry curse/pierce/name senses and requires lexical audit.
The accused is held under guard until judgment is sought, preserving a due-process element rather than immediate mob action.
One judgment applies to native and sojourner.
Eye-for-eye language functions as proportional limitation in ancient law, not permission for escalating revenge or literal retaliation today.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace source-audited restored text.
source_witness_audit_flags: Leviticus 24 continual lamp should crosslink with Exodus 27 and tabernacle-light traditions.
Leviticus 24 bread of presence requires cultic and priestly-provision audit.
Leviticus 24 blasphemy/piercing-the-Name terminology requires deep lexical and reception-history audit.
Leviticus 24 mixed-parentage narrative detail requires anti-xenophobia safeguards.
Leviticus 24 equal-law principle should crosslink with Exodus 12 and Numbers 15.
Leviticus 24 lex talionis requires ancient legal-context, compensation-history, and anti-retaliation audit.
Leviticus 24 execution narrative requires categorical anti-vigilantism and anti-blasphemy-law safeguards.
next_actions: Continue Leviticus with chapter 25: land Sabbath, Jubilee, return of property, release from debt-servitude, redemption, land belonging to YHWH, and anti-exploitation safeguards.
